CustomField.description: FY23 Market Segment for the 2nd Half of the year
CustomField.formula: IF(Vertical__c='Financial Services' ,IF(NumberOfEmployees > 2999 && (Geo_Text__c ='NA' || Geo_Text__c = 'EMEA' || Geo_Text__c = 'SA'),'Enterprise',IF(NumberOfEmployees > 699 && Geo_Text__c ='APAC','Enterprise','FS Unassigned')) ,IF((Geo_Text__c ='NA' || Geo_Text__c = 'EMEA' || Geo_Text__c = 'SA'),IF((NumberOfEmployees > 2999 && (Geo_Text__c = 'EMEA'|| Geo_Text__c = 'SA'))||(NumberOfEmployees > 2999 && Geo_Text__c = 'NA'),'Enterprise','Commercial'),IF(Geo_Text__c ='APAC',IF(NumberOfEmployees > 699,'Enterprise','Commercial'),'')))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: FY23 Market Segment for the 2nd Half of the year
CustomField.label: FY24 Market Segment
